title: gamochaeta guatemalensis
intro: Gamochaeta guatemalensis, also known as Guatemalan bushy betony or Guatemalan sticky groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it a popular choice for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gamochaeta guatemalensis include treating wounds, skin infections, and gastrointestinal problems, as well as reducing fever and inflammation. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine in Central America to treat various ailments.
